item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya tidak setuju dengan argumen bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu diberi prioritas atas hak individu.

notes: Both agents end in a balance frame. Agent A starts pro-society, strengthens that position at turn 3, then visibly narrows it at turn 5 by rejecting always prioritizing society over individual rights while retaining Indonesian historical and group-justice reasons. Agent B starts rights-first, then moves toward balance and acknowledges public policy can sacrifice minority rights, while still grounding justice in protection of individual rights. Indonesian quality has minor casing artifact in Agent A turn 1: "AKU SETuju".
